steps.title: Use the contrast signal
steps.content: The word "instead" shows that Haddad and Alami chose a path different from the usual focus on people above sea level. The blank should describe an approach that is new or unconventional.

steps.title: Eliminate mismatched meanings
steps.content: A suggests a routine or expected path, which conflicts with "instead." B means old or overused, so it also points toward convention. D describes an attitude or motivation, not a research path that differs from standard practice. The answer is C.
